Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 59 

CLM_VAL_CD 

LABEL: Claim Value Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating a monetary condition which was used on an institutional claim. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_VAL_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_VAL_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP value code file 
SNF value code file 
HH value code file 
OP value code file
